prompt: Do a deepdive on Anthropic for me — I want a research brief I can use before applying.

assertions.text: Research brief .docx is saved at outputs/reports/Anthropic_Research_Brief.docx (or similar; docx extension required).
Investors JSON saved at outputs/reports/Anthropic_investors.json — a JSON array of investor company-name strings.
Fit score (a number out of 10) appears in the .docx, alongside a STRONG / MODERATE / WEAK label.
Fit rationale paragraph references the user.background phrasing from config (not a generic 'strong fit' sentence).
At least one investor is recognized as a tier-1 VC per config.deepdive.tier1_vcs (e.g. Google / GV / Spark / a16z etc. — whichever the research surfaces).
Funding history table includes at least one round with amount and date — no fabricated numbers (the brief says 'not disclosed' when missing).
Role Fit Signals section references at least one of config.targets.roles (software engineer / product manager / founding engineer / data scientist / designer).
